charter.phase_name: V1.12H High-Level Consolidation Candidate Substate Draft
charter.mission: Generate a review-only candidate substate draft for high_level_consolidation using the frozen V1.12B pilot dataset and V1.12G semantic-v2 features.
in_scope: cluster statistics and representative rows only
success_criteria: show test-fold misread-rate differences per cluster
stop_criteria: the draft needs new labels to stay coherent
the evidence collapses into a single undifferentiated bucket
the draft requires scope widening or heavy search
charter.handoff_condition: owner review before any label split or dataset growth

interpretation: V1.12H is a review-only drafting phase, not a formal label split.
Its purpose is to expose candidate substates that can later be judged by the owner.
No automatic label change is authorized by this charter.
